final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell with a latch. The cell outputs the stored value (Q) when WE is high, and stores the value of D when WE is low.
module dram_cell (
    input wire D,    // Data input
    input wire WE,   // Write enable
    output reg Q     // Stored value output
);

always @(WE or D) begin
    if (WE) begin
        Q <= D;  // Store the value of D when WE is high
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell with a latch. The cell outputs the stored value (Q) when WE is high, and stores the value of D when WE is low.
